title: RBD-979 Beautiful landlady anal entertainment of atrocities Minatsu Aikawa
description: Minako is the proprietress of the long-established inn "Tachibana" in a local hot spring town. Instead of her husband who was bedridden due to illness, he is managing the inn. Meanwhile, Todo, the president of rival inn "Fujinoyu", plans to open a sex shop. Minako, who was in conflict to protect the hot spring town, was betrayed by the guard and was put in the trap of Todo.
